title: True Toyota
description: Adds an immersive and (pretty) accurate 12th doctor interior to ait using a datapack and resourcepack.
body:
### What does this addon add?

This adds the last version of the toyota interior (seen in series 10). This pack aim to add an immersive experiance hopfuly recreating that feeling from when we first saw the interior in 2017  

Check out the video i made on it! > https://youtu.be/7q1cdry878I

**(fyi: The ResourcePack you NEED is at the bottom of the specific version page!!)**

*****
### Main Features!

- Spinny thingy majig (yes it actually moves)
- Spinny wall lights
- The round things (what are they??)
- Emersive effects (like particles)
- Custom models (done via a resourcepack)

*****
### Required Mods!

- [Adventures in time mod 1.2.0-1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/ait/version/1.2.0.2788-1.20.1)

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/version/3.0.0+1.20.1) (you might need to enable `Emissive Textures` in the config file!)
*****

### Credits

- Addie: Lead builder / commandblocker

- Classic_Account: Helped with building / referances (thx sm)

****
### Links
